name: Nurul Wahid
title: Journalist | Human Rights Activist | Media Professional
bio: Award-winning journalist and human rights activist based in Barcelona, Spain. With over 25 years of experience in media, I've dedicated my career to truth-seeking, investigative journalism, and advocating for marginalized communities.
mission: To amplify voices that need to be heard, expose injustices, and contribute to a more informed and equitable world through responsible journalism.
